name: Caterwaul Sling
description:
Made of shiny brown leather, this +1 striking sling has a single white thread interwoven into its cord.

Activate—Unleash Roar (2 Actions) (manipulate, sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You pull the white thread free, then whirl the sling in circles at high speed. It lets out an ear-piercing wave of sound. Each creature in a 30-foot cone takes 4d6 sonic damage (DC 21 Fortitude check save). Any creature that fails is Deafened for 1 round, or 1 hour on a critical failure.
